description: A subcontractor has submitted an invoice for work completed last month. The project controls team must verify the progress claimed before approving payment.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the subcontractor's invoice and the associated contract.

expected_outcome.value: Agent pulls up the invoice and the subcontract agreement.

nodes.task_description: Compare the progress claimed on the invoice against the daily progress reports submitted by the field engineer.

expected_outcome.value: Agent verifies that the claimed work (e.g., '1000 cubic meters of concrete poured') matches the field reports.

nodes.task_description: Approve the invoice for the verified amount and route it to accounts payable for payment.

expected_outcome.value: Agent approves the invoice, which is then sent to the AP department.
